verdict.summary: The round-1 major finding is resolved. `gh secret set` now has combined stdout/stderr captured and never relayed; a failure emits only a fixed identifier-free diagnostic, returns non-zero, and occurs before `rotated=true` is written. The added failure-path fake deliberately prints both reversible identifiers and exits non-zero, so the log-redaction and fail-closed checks would fail if output capture or control flow regressed. The success-path fake likewise makes its no-identifier assertion non-vacuous. The workflow diagnostics and verdict/comment sink redaction consistently remove raw account handles and email addresses without weakening SHA binding or machine verdict fields. No hostile reviewer-directed instruction was detected in the diff.
